design_philosophy.core_loop: Autoscrolling vertical shooter with dual-direction firing (up/down). Player navigates between screen threats while managing elemental weapon selection across 7 levels with player-chosen progression order for first four stages.
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Multi-directional threat management in confined vertical space. Balancing offensive positioning (shooting up vs. down) against incoming hazards.
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Master of elemental magic commanding different spell types (fire, ice, lightning, etc.) to overcome corrupted kingdom and confront betraying brother Roki.
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Unusual dual-directional firing mechanic for autoscrolling shmup (not purely forward-focused). Player agency in level order for first half creates non-linear progression path within linear mechanical framework. Fantasy-themed shmup positioning in genre dominated by sci-fi aesthetics.

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Level select order for first four stages provides some player control over difficulty curve and pacing. Weapon variety (elemental magic types) offers strategic flexibility in approach.

progression.upgrade_system: Elemental weapon switching system (seven element-based magic types available throughout campaign)
progression.unlock_mechanism: First four of seven levels selectable in player-chosen order; final three levels locked in sequence. Progression advances through defeating stage-specific challenges and environmental hazards.
replayability_hooks: Level select variability enables different run orders on replays
Multiple elemental weapon types encourage experimentation with different strategies
Synth-rock soundtrack with classical elements cited as audiovisually engaging for repeated plays

world_building_techniques: Text exposition establishing fantasy kingdom of Lorelei setting
Character motivation through family betrayal (Laden vs. brother Roki)
Thematic connection between elemental magic system and narrative of magical corruption by Gyra

notable_bosses: Roki (antagonist brother, betrayer, backed by Gyra's power)

faction_indicators: Gyra's followers (sealed evil cult, subsequently liberated)
Kingdom loyalists vs. Roki's coup faction
Sorcerer hierarchy (Laden as strongest, Roki as corrupted peer)
danger_signals: Sorcerer betrayal breaking sacred trust with kingdom
Unleashing ancient sealed evil through deliberate sabotage
Magical corruption spreading influence across realm
environmental_storytelling: Castle setting as location of both sealing and betrayal
Kingdom environment transformed by Gyra's influence
Elemental magic system reflects thematic corruption of natural forces
